checks.name: Random seed fixed
checks.fix: Add seed=42 to your training script and all eval scripts.

checks.name: Multiple seed runs (≥2)
checks.fix: Run each experiment with at least 3 seeds and report mean ± std. Single-seed results are not publishable.

checks.name: Baseline comparison exists
checks.fix: Train and save a simple baseline to compare against. Without a baseline, improvement claims cannot be verified.

checks.name: Dependencies documented
checks.fix: Add requirements.txt with pinned versions. Run: pip freeze > requirements.txt

checks.name: Model checkpoints saved
checks.fix: Save model checkpoints during training so experiments can be reproduced.

checks.name: Hyperparameters documented
checks.fix: Save hyperparameters to a config.yaml file before each run.

checks.name: Evaluation logs saved
checks.fix: Save evaluation metrics to a log file during training. Use callbacks or manual logging after each epoch.

checks.name: README exists
checks.fix: Add a README.md explaining how to run the experiments.

top_fixes: Run each experiment with at least 3 seeds and report mean ± std. Single-seed results are not publishable.
Add a README.md explaining how to run the experiments.
